condition: component code Maps-to a standard concept with domain_id='Observation' (e.g. PRAPARE survey questions, social-history panels — components ARE the questions, parent is the panel).
narrative_md:
Sibling to `Observation_component__measurement`. Both read the single shared `staging.observation_component_resolved` table built by `mapspec/etl/_resolve_observation_component.sql` (per-component fan-out + Maps-to walked once, generalised beyond LOINC); this edge is a trivial `WHERE std_domain='Observation'` filter. Surrogate `observation_id = stringToId(Observation.id || '/o/' || component_code || '|' || std_concept_id)` — the `/o/` infix keeps component-observation ids distinct from component-measurement ids. Closes a major data loss path: without this edge, PRAPARE survey responses and other questionnaire-style components emitted by Synthea as `Observation.component[]` are silently dropped (the parent panel Observation is written, but the component answers — the actual data — are not).

Measured impact on the 100-patient Synthea cohort: ~17.6k component-derived observation rows.

fields.notes: hashtextextended(Observation.id || '/o/' || component.code, 0). The '/o/' separator (vs '/' in measurement sibling) keeps observation-component IDs deterministically distinct from measurement-component IDs derived from the same parent.
LOINC → standard Observation-domain concept via vocab.concept_relationship 'Maps to'.
Numeric value if component has valueQuantity (rare for Observation-domain — usually qualitative).
Not extracted at view-level for components yet — components with valueString aren't captured. See action items.
Not extracted at view-level for components yet — components with valueCodeableConcept aren't captured. See action items.
UCUM lookup; null when component is non-numeric.

references.notes: Added 2026-05-24 to close 17730-row data-loss gap discovered in Observation__observation review.
HL7 IG draft StructureMap — does not specify component fan-out.

edge_cases.handling: Currently dropped because view doesn't extract these. Most PRAPARE-style responses fall here — value_as_number is written but the answer text/code isn't. See cluster review action item.

edge_cases.case: Component with no value at all
edge_cases.handling: Still written if LOINC resolves to Observation domain. value_as_number, value_as_string, value_as_concept_id all null.
Avoided by '/o/' vs '/' separator in observation_id hash input.
